why.fastDesc: Most swaps complete in under 5 minutes thanks to automated processing.
why.coinsDesc: Exchange between Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and hundreds of other cryptocurrencies.
why.ratesDesc: We compare rates across providers to get you the best deal every time.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How long does an exchange take?
faq.a1: Most exchanges complete in 2–30 minutes depending on network congestion and required confirmations.
faq.q2: How do I track my transaction?
faq.a2: Use the Order Status page with the transaction ID you received when starting the exchange.
faq.a3: No. You can exchange without creating an account. Optional sign-up lets you save addresses and view history.
faq.a4: No. The rate you see before confirming is the rate you get. Network fees are shown upfront.

footer.tagline: Non-custodial crypto exchange. No KYC required.
